name: Lal Chutney- Fresh Red Chutney with Almonds - India
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the red pepper, mint leaves, lemon juice, garlic, chili powder, salt, and black pepper in a blender.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Add the slivered almonds to the blender and blend again.
4. Transfer the mixture to a bowl.
5. Check the seasoning and add more dill if desired.
6. Serve with Hamburger Kabobs.
